summary: Phenomenal audience recording capturing an outstanding Grateful Dead show
review: The sole reviewer gave this tape a perfect five‑star rating, calling it a “Phenomenal AUD”. While no specific songs or performance details are mentioned, the enthusiastic language implies both the live performance and the audience‑recorded sound are highly regarded.
